# Terms specific to Rancher Desktop
Archs
ctl
ctrctl
devmode
eio
genericfeatures
goruntime
mountpoint
nerdctl
nochange
rancherdesktop
rdctl
rdd

# container namespace (resource short name)
cns
# shared controller manager
scm
# sample controllers
cmrs

# Lima
basedisk
cidata
diffdisk
guestagent
limactl
limavm
pidfile
rosetta
syncer
workdir
